title: Atlas Academy Composition Review
description: A single, structured composition-only scoring result for one map, per academy/composition-validator.md and academy/scoring-model.md (WO-2008). Scores ten evaluation areas independently of any full map grade. This record is evidence a future schemas/academy-map-grade.schema.json record's composition category should cite; it does not itself carry outcome or remediation-tag authority, and it does not substitute for schemas/academy-map-grade.schema.json's broader project_fit or readability categories - see academy/composition-validator.md's Ten Evaluation Areas table for the exact non-overlap boundary on each new area.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema the record was produced against.

review_id.description: Stable identifier for this composition review, e.g. CMP-ITEMSHOP-001. A map reviewed more than once gets a new review_id each time - reviews are never overwritten in place, matching schemas/academy-map-grade.schema.json's grade_id convention.

reviewer.description: The agent or human who produced this review, matching the observer/owner/grader convention used across every other Academy record.

governing_pattern.description: pattern_id of the Design Pattern this map's composition is checked against for the Project Identity area, if one exists (e.g. PAT-INTERIOR-SHOP). Null if no governing pattern is cited.

area.description: The ten evaluation areas named in work-orders/WO-2008-composition-validator.md, reconciled against existing Academy documents in academy/composition-validator.md's Ten Evaluation Areas table. Six correspond directly to an academy/composition-analysis.md topic; four (landmarks, navigation, atmosphere, project_identity) are new and deliberately scoped narrower than any similarly-named schemas/academy-map-grade.schema.json category to avoid duplicating that category's authority.

score.description: 1 (actively undermines the map) to 5 (exemplary), per academy/scoring-model.md's scale. Null only when confidence is insufficient_evidence - never invented in the absence of grounding evidence.

confidence.description: Matches schemas/academy-map-grade.schema.json's identical field and academy/scoring-model.md's confidence discipline.

rationale.description: The specific, falsifiable reason behind this score, per academy/curriculum.md Level 3's diagnostic standard.

evidence.description: Paths to the academy/composition-rubric.md verdict, observation record, metrics record, Design Pattern, or Implementation Packet this score traces to. For the six areas with a direct academy/composition-analysis.md topic match, the corresponding academy/composition-rubric.md Holds/Gap/N/A verdict must be cited here, per academy/scoring-model.md's Evidence Discipline.

overall_composition_summary.description: A short synthesis across all ten area scores explaining why the composition succeeds or fails, per work-orders/WO-2008's Success Criteria. Not an eleventh score. This is the field a future schemas/academy-map-grade.schema.json record's composition category should cite directly rather than re-deriving a verdict from raw evidence a second time.

notes.description: Free-text notes not captured by the structured fields above.
